title: REGIONAL FAMILY NETWORK - 211info
text: CREATING OPPORTUNITIES REGIONAL FAMILY NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support services including information and referral, advocacy, and system navigation including Individualized Education Programs (IEPs), Developmental Disabilities (DD) services, healthcare, and other public systems. parenting classes, information and referral, and advocacy services. 680 State Street Suite #100 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Children and youth with disabilities and their families Hours: Vary Email (503) 559-0424 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 559-0424 Cheryl Cisneros Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties Services: Advocacy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Parenting Skills Classes * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Specialized Information and Referral * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
